title: 10 health benefits of Maranta arundinacea (prayer plant)
intro: Maranta arundinacea has health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's extracts have been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including skin conditions like eczema and acne. Its anti-inflammatory properties can help alleviate pain and reduce swelling, making it a potential treatment for arthritis and other inflammatory disorders. For instance, the plant's topical application can provide relief from sunburns and insect bites, improving overall skin health and well-being.
